provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against claude. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
Entering the diagnose discipline. Phase 1 is building a fast,
deterministic feedback loop before touching code: replay a
captured checkout request against the payment path in staging
and loop it 100 times to raise the reproduction rate above
the ~3% you see today. Only then do we hypothesise.
